meta.title: Nostr WoT - Identity Provider, Signer, Lightning Wallet & Web of Trust
meta.description: Nostr identity provider, NIP-07 signer, Lightning wallet, and Web of Trust browser extension. Manage multiple accounts, sign events, encrypt messages, send zaps, and filter spam with trust scores.

hero.title: Your Nostr Identity &
hero.description: A complete Nostr identity provider, trust system, and Lightning wallet. Manage your keys, sign events, encrypt messages, send zaps, and filter spam — all in one extension.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: Get started with your Nostr identity and Web of Trust in three simple steps.

step1.title: Install & Set Up
step1.description: Add the extension to your browser. Create a new account, import your keys, or connect a remote signer.

step2.title: Sign In Everywhere
step2.description: The extension provides NIP-07 signing to any Nostr client — manage permissions, sign events, and encrypt messages.

step3.title: Build Trust
step3.description: Your Web of Trust follows you across every app. See trust badges, filter spam, and verify who's in your network.

howItWorks.learnMoreLink: Learn more about how Web of Trust works

whyWot.title: Why Web of Trust?
whyWot.description: Leverage your existing social connections to determine who to trust, without relying on centralized authorities.

decentralized.title: Decentralized Filtering
decentralized.description: Your network, your rules. Filter spam based on social distance instead of centralized blocklists that can be censored or manipulated.

fast.title: Lightning Fast
fast.description: Sub-millisecond queries even with millions of users. Our Oracle handles 10,000+ requests per second for real-time filtering.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Choose local-only mode for complete privacy, or use the Oracle for speed. Your data stays under your control.

extension.title: Nostr WoT Extension
extension.descriptionStart: A complete Nostr identity provider, Lightning wallet, and Web of Trust extension. NIP-07 signer, encrypted vault, multi-account management, built-in wallet, and the
extension.descriptionEnd: API for trust queries — all in one package.

clientSide.title: NIP-07 signer & encryption
clientSide.description: Sign events (NIP-07), encrypt messages (NIP-04 & NIP-44), and manage permissions per site

mode.title: Multi-account & remote signer
mode.description: Multiple accounts with HD derivation, watch-only mode, and NIP-46 remote signer support

privacy.title: Encrypted vault & auto-lock
privacy.description: AES-256-GCM encrypted key storage with PBKDF2, configurable auto-lock, and secure key backup

badges.title: Trust badge injection
badges.description: See color-coded trust badges on Nostr sites showing social distance at a glance

permissions.title: Granular permissions
permissions.description: Per-account, per-domain, per-method permission controls with activity logging

i18n.title: Lightning wallet & WebLN
i18n.description: Built-in wallet for zaps — connect via NWC, LNbits, or get one in a click with quick setup

oracle.title: WoT Oracle
oracle.description: A high-performance backend service that indexes the entire Nostr follow graph, delivering sub-millisecond trust queries at massive scale.

api.title: Simple REST API
api.description: Easy integration with any backend or frontend

performance.title: 10,000+ queries/second
performance.description: Built for real-time filtering at scale

selfHost.title: Self-hostable
selfHost.description: Run your own instance for complete control

sdk.title: nostr-wot-sdk
sdk.description: Integrate Web of Trust directly into your JavaScript or TypeScript application with our official SDK. Works with or without the browser extension.

extensionFirst.title: Extension-first design
extensionFirst.description: Automatically uses extension when available, falls back to oracle

typescript.title: Full TypeScript support
typescript.description: Complete type definitions for a great developer experience

react.title: React hooks included
react.description: Ready-to-use WoTProvider and useWoT hook for React apps

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about Web of Trust

whatIsWot.question: What is Web of Trust?
whatIsWot.answer: Web of Trust measures social distance—how many 'hops' separate you from another user in the Nostr follow graph. If you follow someone, they're 1 hop away. If they follow someone else, that person is 2 hops from you. This helps filter spam and verify reputation without centralized blocklists.

howDoesItWork.question: How does it work?
howDoesItWork.answer: The extension acts as your Nostr identity provider (NIP-07 signer) and Web of Trust engine. It manages your keys in an encrypted vault, signs events for any Nostr client, and indexes your follow list to calculate social distances. Apps query through window.nostr for signing and window.nostr.wot for trust scores.

isItPrivate.question: Is my data private?
isItPrivate.answer: Yes. In Local mode, all calculations happen in your browser—nothing leaves your device. In Remote mode, only pubkey lookups are sent to the oracle (no content data). You can also self-host the oracle for complete control.

whichBrowsers.question: Which browsers are supported?
whichBrowsers.answer: The extension works on all major browsers: Chrome, Brave, Edge, Opera, and Firefox.

isFree.question: Is it free?
isFree.answer: Yes, completely free and open source under the MIT license. The extension, SDK, Oracle API, and all source code are available on GitHub.

howToIntegrate.question: How do I integrate WoT into my app?
howToIntegrate.answer: You have three options: use the browser extension's window.nostr.wot API for client-side queries, use the nostr-wot-sdk npm package for a unified interface, or query the Oracle REST API directly for server-side integration.

wallet.question: Does it have a wallet?
wallet.answer: Yes. The extension includes a built-in Lightning wallet for sending and receiving zaps. You can connect your own wallet via Nostr Wallet Connect (NWC), use an LNbits instance, or create one instantly with the quick setup option. The extension also provides a WebLN provider so Nostr apps can request payments directly.

playground.title: Try the Playground
playground.description: Explore your Web of Trust graph interactively. See your social connections, trust distances, and how the extension works in real-time.

notice.title: Install from Chrome Web Store
notice.description: The extension is now available on the Chrome Web Store for easy installation:

steps.step2: Go to chrome://extensions in your browser

notice.note: No build required - the extension loads directly from source.

cta.title: Ready to Build Trust?
cta.description: Join the growing ecosystem of Nostr apps using Web of Trust. Start filtering spam and building reputation today.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Get the latest updates on Nostr Web of Trust, new features, and ecosystem news.
newsletter.success: Thanks for subscribing! We'll keep you updated.
